name: io.github.askable-ui/askable
description: Expose your web app's live UI context — what the user is looking at, as structured Context Packets — to Claude Desktop, Cursor, and any MCP client.

package_arguments.name: --url
package_arguments.description: HTTP(S) endpoint that returns the current Context packet as JSON on GET

package_arguments.name: --file
package_arguments.description: Path to a static Context packet JSON file (alternative to --url)

package_arguments.name: --require-redacted
package_arguments.description: Refuse to serve packets with privacy.redacted === false
